data.title: Block CEO Jack Dorsey Sports Cryptic 'Satoshi' T-Shirt At Africa Bitcoin Conference
data.description: CEO and co-founder of Block Inc. Jack Dorsey made an appearance in Kenya for the Africa Bitcoin Conference, which will take place in Nairobi from Dec. 9 to 11.

data.title: What's A Ghost Gun That Alleged UnitedHealthcare CEO Assassin Used In NYC?
data.description: Ghost guns can be assembled from kits bought online or manufactured using 3D printers – they lack serial numbers and are untraceable.

data.title: Bill Gates Could Go Bankrupt If Tesla Stock Surges 200% To Become The Top Company, Says Elon Musk
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk claimed on X that Microsoft Corp. co-founder Bill Gates could face bankruptcy if Tesla becomes "the world's most valuable company by far," escalating their long-running dispute over Gates' short position in the electric vehicle maker.

data.title: Microsoft, Amazon Investors Eye Bitcoin Investments Amid MicroStrategy's Success
data.description: Investors in Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ:MSFT) and Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) are evaluating proposals to invest in Bitcoin (CRYPTO:
